name: Cashback Loans | Santa Ana
description_short: Cashback Loans offers online payday loans in Santa Ana with loan amounts from $150–$1,500, same-day funding, and 24/7 application availability as a state-licensed direct lender.
description_long:
Cashback Loans is a state-licensed direct lender operating since 2003 with over 20 years of combined industry experience. The company has funded over 4 million loans across California and operates 50+ online and retail store locations with a team of 100+ professionals. Their Santa Ana operation is online-only, serving Orange County residents and other California areas via their website and call center.

The company specializes in short-term payday loans ranging from $150 to $1,500, with loan amounts varying by state. They emphasize fast approvals, 24-hour availability, and an online customer portal for payment management and balance tracking. Services include 24-hour payday loans, payday loans online, emergency payday loans, cash advance loans, and direct lender payday loans. All services are marketed as upfront with competitive rates and transparent, hassle-free processes.

Cashback Loans distinguishes itself through state licensing compliance, a decade-plus track record, friendly customer service representatives, and a simple online application process available 24/7. Customer reviews on Google average 3.7 stars (6 reviews), with 70% five-star ratings praising staff and fast service (some approvals within one hour). The company markets itself as dedicated to honesty, transparency, and customer satisfaction.

As a payday lender, Cashback Loans serves consumers facing immediate cash shortfalls, though borrowers should be aware that payday loans typically carry high APRs and short repayment terms. The company is transparent about licensing and regulatory compliance but does not disclose specific APRs or fee structures on the website. This product is best suited for true emergencies, not ongoing financial management.
address: 2413 S Fairview St # I, Santa Ana, CA 92704

company_info.headquarters: 2413 S Fairview St # I, Santa Ana, CA 92704

pros: State-licensed direct lender with 20+ years of industry experience and 4+ million loans funded in California
24/7 online application availability with same-day or next-day funding for approved applicants
Loan amounts from $150–$1,500 depending on state, with multiple funding tiers available
Online customer portal to manage payments, track balances, and access account information
Fast approvals reported—some customers approved and funded within one hour
Local call center support at (909)-483-0474 with knowledgeable and friendly representatives
Multiple service channels: online application, phone application, and physical retail locations in select areas
cons: APR and fee structure not disclosed on website, making cost comparison difficult before application
Santa Ana location is online-only; no physical storefront despite company operating 50+ locations statewide
Payday loans carry inherently high APRs and short repayment terms, creating debt cycle risk for vulnerable borrowers
Limited independent third-party reviews (only 6 Google reviews) despite company's claimed scale and 20-year history
Not a payday alternative—this is a traditional high-cost payday lender, not a 36% APR or lower solution
best_for: Consumers facing true emergencies who need $150–$1,500 within 24 hours and have the means to repay quickly
Borrowers in California with steady income who qualify for payday loans and prefer online-only convenience
Those seeking transparent, state-licensed lending with an established company track record over newer fintech lenders
diagnosis: Cashback Loans is best for California residents experiencing genuine financial emergencies who need $150–$1,500 within 24 hours and can repay within weeks. The main caveat is that payday loans carry high APRs (not disclosed on this website) and short terms, making them expensive and risky for repeat borrowing; this should only be a last resort, not a regular financial tool.
services: Online payday loans with 24/7 application availability
24-hour payday loans for emergency cash needs
Direct lender payday loans (not broker services)
Online customer portal for payment management and balance tracking
Phone-based application support via call center
Multiple loan amount tiers ($150–$1,500 depending on state)
Retail store applications at select California locations
FAQ and blog resources on lending topics
Transparent pricing and upfront fee disclosure
meta_description: Cashback Loans offers online payday loans in Santa Ana ($150-$1,500) with same-day funding and 24/7 availability.
